creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
The link Supports->Bug Reports on the main page doesn't work in Firefox 130.  In fact, the following link Submitting Bug Reports doesn't either.  If I key in the url I see down in the lower left of the window ... that works, but somehow clicking does nothing.

This is using Firefox 130.0 compiled and installed on FreeBSD-14.1p5.
